Draws the score on the screen
drawScore() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Draws the score in the corner of the screen, utilizing a different viewport and a FreeTypeFont
drawShield() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Draws the shield at the cat's current position

hasAliveGhosts() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Checks whether any ghost in this turn is still alive.
hasDyingGhosts() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Checks whether any ghost in this turn is still showing its death animation.
hasShield - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
whether the cat has its shield
hasShield() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Returns whether the cat has its shield
heart - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The texture for the heart image
heartOutline - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The Texture for the outline of the heart image
heartPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
Height - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Rectangle
 
hide() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.EndScreen
Inherited method from the Screen interface that is not in use
hide() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Inherited method from the screen class that we are not using
hide() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
Inherited method from the Screen interface that is not in use
home - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.EndScreen
The sprite for the home texture
homeIcon - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.EndScreen
The Texture for the home Image
HomeScreen - Class in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
Displays the screen that a player sees first with the big center play button
HomeScreen(Main) - Constructor for class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
Constructs the home screen and initializes its main assets.
HORIZONTAL - Enum constant in enum class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat.State
 
horizontalDirection - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
The speed of the shield ghost in the horizontal direction
horizontalLine - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
Textures used for shapes
horizontalLines - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
The number of horizontal lines this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)
horizontalLines - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Whether the current turn still contains horizontal line shapes.

I

Index - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Result
 
intersectRay(float, float, float, double) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Finds where a ray at the given angle intersects the edge of the screen.
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project - package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
 
isAlive() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Returns whether the player still has hearts
isAlive() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Checks if this ghost is alive
isAlive() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
checks if the ghostTurn is alive
isCompleted() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Checks if the level is completed
isCompletelyFinished() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Checks whether this turn is fully finished, including any death animations.
isDrawing - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Whether the player is drawing
isDying - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Whether this ghost is currently dying
isFish - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Whether this ghost object is a fish
isFulk - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
whether this ghost object is Mr.
isGameOver(Cat) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Checks whether the player has lost.
isPausing - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Whether the ghost is still (only for shields)
isShield - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
whether this ghost object is a ghost with a shield (circle)

L

l1 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.LevelSetup
Level 1 object
l2 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.LevelSetup
Level 2 object
l3 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.LevelSetup
Level 3 object
l4 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.LevelSetup
Level 4 object
l5 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.LevelSetup
Level 5 object
lastShapeEquals(int) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Checks if the last shape in the arraylist is the target shape
lastTheta - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Utils
 
lasttime - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
The last time the ghosts' shapes was reset
leftSquareBracketPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
Level - Class in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
Represents a singular Level in the game, managing the ghostTurns in the level
Level(int, int, Main) - Constructor for class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Constructs a level using the parameters given and sets the background field based on the level number
level1 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The level objects for each level
level2 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The level objects for each level
level3 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The level objects for each level
level4 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The level objects for each level
level5 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The level objects for each level
levelNumber - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
the number of this level (from 1-5)
levels - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameEngine
The levels in the game
LevelSetup - Class in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
Sets up the levels with all their ghostTurns
LevelSetup(Main) - Constructor for class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.LevelSetup
Initializes the 5 level fields, and adds their ghostTurns to them
lineToDownPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
lineToLeftPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
lineToRightPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
lineToUpPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
listener - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Dollar
 
lives - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
The number of lives the player has

loadTemplate(String, int[]) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
loadTemplatesCircles() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
loadTemplatesDefault() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
loadTemplatesPhoto() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
loadTemplatesSimple() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
loseLife() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Decrements the cat's lives by 1

M

Main - Class in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
Main game class that loads shared assets, creates the viewport and stage, starts the background music, and opens the home screen.
Main() - Constructor for class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
 
map - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
The map used to connect a number to its respective shape
map1 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The map used to translate the shape number into an actual texture/image
map2 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The map used to convert the name of the shape to its respective number or color
msatan(double) - Static method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Trigonometric
 
music - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The background music played during the game
mxatan(double) - Static method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Trigonometric
 
myViewport - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The viewport used for the positioning of the entire game

Increments the current level index, progressing to the next level.
nextTurn() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level

normalVs - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Whether the current turn still contains normal V shapes.
numAlive - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
The number of ghosts that haven't been killed in this wave
numGhosts - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn

recognize() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Dollar
 
Recognize(Vector) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
Attempts to recognize the given stroke as one of the enabled shapes.
recognizer - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Dollar
 
recognizer - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The recognizer that recognizes the player shape drawn
Recognizer - Class in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
Recognizes drawn gestures by comparing the player's stroke to a set of shape templates.
Recognizer() - Constructor for class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
Recognizer(boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
Constructs a recognizer with only the currently needed shape templates enabled.

Draws the image onto the screen, using delta to control animations

Renders the image on the screen, using helper methods as necessary
render(float) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
renders (or draws) the screen, and uses delta to control movements

The score the player currently has
score - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.EndScreen
The score the player ended with
Score - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Result
 
setActive(boolean) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Dollar
 
setListener(DollarListener) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Dollar
 
setPosition(float, float) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Sets the cat's position to the given values
setState(Cat.State) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Sets the cat's current texture
shapeDrawn(int, Cat) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Removes the shape corresponding to shapeIndex from the end of the ghosts Increments the scores if needed Adds a shield to the cat if needed Removes ghosts if needed Also updates the five shape fields based on the shape removed
shapeDrawn(int, Cat) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Calls the ghostTurn shapeDrawn based on the index of the shape and plays the shapes' respective noise.
shapeRenderer - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The renderer that draws the player's line on the screen
shapes - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
An arraylist of the shapes on top of the ghost (represented by a shape index 0-3)
shield - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The texture for the shield image
shieldGhost - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The texture used for the ghost that has a shield
shieldGhostPic - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The texture for the shield ghost image
shieldGhostSprite - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The sprite for the shield ghost texture
shieldOff() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Turns the cat's shield off
shieldOn() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat
Turns the cat's shield on
shieldPause(float) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Changes isPausing for this ghost based on time (only for shields)
show() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.EndScreen
Sets up the Textures and Sprites in the screen
show() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Initializes textures, fonts, and fills up the fields initialized in the constructor
show() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
Initializes the non-static fields
showTransition - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Whether the level transition needs to be shown
sound1 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The sounds played for each stroke shape
sound2 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The sounds played for each stroke shape
sound3 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The sounds played for each stroke shape
sound4 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The sounds played for each stroke shape
sound5 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The sounds played for each stroke shape
speedModifier - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Speed modifier for the ghosts
speedModifier() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Modifies the speed by a factor based on the number of shapes and number of ghosts

SquareSize - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Recognizer
 
stage - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
The stage for the entire game
starPoints - Static variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.TemplateData
 
startLevel() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
initializes the spawning positions of all the ghosts in all the turns of this Level
state - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Dollar
 
State() - Constructor for enum class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat.State
 
stateTimer - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
A timer used to manage the positioning of a ghost with a shield
strlen - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
The number of shapes to eliminate from the ghost
strtointarray(String[]) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
Helper method that converts an array of strings into an array of integers (the strings in this method are guaranteed to be integers)

T

Template - Class in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Theta - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Result
 
timesum - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
The amount of time that has passed used for the ghosts' shapes
timesum2 - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
The sum of time used for the oscillating size of the play button
title - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.HomeScreen
The texture that is initialized with game name
totshapes - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Constant value of the number of possible shapes
touchDown(int, int, int, int) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Inherited methods from the InputAdapter class that deal with whether the mouse is down (starts drawing points)
touchDragged(int, int, int) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
Called when the mouse is dragged on the screen.
TouchListener - Interface in io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project
 
touchUp(int, int, int, int) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
When a drag or touch is removed from the screen, this is called.
transitionBackground - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
An arraylist of the level transition rectangle the flies by for each level
transitionTime - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The timer for the amount of time in transition

U

uiViewport - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.EndScreen
The viewport for writing text
uiViewport - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
The uiViewport, used for the location of text
update(float, Cat) - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
First checks if the turn is completed, and returns if so.
updateCounts() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
Initializes the circle, horizontalLines, normalVs, etc.
updateCounts() - Method in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
Updates which shape types are still present in the current turn.
UPSIDE_DOWN_V - Enum constant in enum class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Cat.State
 
upsideDownV - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Main
Textures used for shapes
upsideDownVs - Variable in class io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghostturn
The number of upside down V's this ghostTurn has currently (across living ghosts)
